Fahrenheit 9/11 (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $119,114,517Details
International Box Office $102,034,442
Worldwide Box Office $221,148,959
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$23,920,637 (20.1% of total gross)
Legs:4.98 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:53.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$6,000,000 (worldwide box office is 36.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:868 opening theaters/2,011 max. theaters, 6.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $229,405,741

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 23rd, 2004 (Wide) by Lionsgate
International Releases: July 29th, 2004 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: October 5th, 2004 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for violence, disturbing images and language
Running Time: 121 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Agitprop, Archive Footage
Plot point: 9/11
Social setting: War on Terror
Subgenre: Political Documentary
Source:Based on Real Life Events
Genre:Documentary
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Factual
Production/Financing Companies: Dog Eat Dog, Wild Bunch, Jim Czarnecki
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
